allow_instructions: Allow read-only git inspection and repository-local documentation and agent-run configuration changes under docs/agent-runs/, AGENTS.md, and .cursor/ during controlled four-agent prep or Lead documentation work.
Allow git add and git commit for path-legal agent-workflow documentation after confirming the agent is on an assigned non-main branch.
block_instructions: Block git reset --hard, git clean, git push --force, branch deletion, and recursive destructive file deletion.
Block package installation commands such as pip install, npm install, yarn, pnpm, and cargo install unless Mike explicitly authorizes them.
Block AWS CLI, deployment scripts, Production operations, credential changes, and environment-variable changes.
Block Airtable schema creation, deletion, rename, or migration commands.
Block workers from merging branches; only the Lead may merge worker branches into the integration branch.
Require explicit Mike approval before any merge to master or main.
Require approval for git merge and git push even when other git commands are allowed.
